detail.instructions: Replace repeated table boilerplate with a small macro_rules! helper that keeps case names visible. Add proptest properties covering every value in 0..=100 and every value above 100.

hints.body: Keep the macro local to tests and focused on readability.
Property tests complement examples by covering whole input ranges.

detail.completionExplanation: The final test suite combines readable named examples, executable documentation, and generated invariant coverage without hiding the percentage policy behind macro complexity.

cases.name: percentage-direct-construction
